snippet.title: Danijela Е tajnfeld za Insajder: Htela sam da izbegnem da otkrijem ime, ali je jedna kap prelila ДҚaЕЎu
snippet.description:
вҖңMene je silovao moj kolega i dragi prijatelj Branislav LeДҚiДҮ, u maju 2012. godine. Posle ДҚetiri dana igrali smo predstavu. Bila sam u ЕЎoku. Htela sam odmah da zovem policiju, ali sam razmiЕЎljala ЕЎta ДҮe se desiti. Morate da razumete to stanjeвҖң, kaЕҫe u ekskluzivnom intervjuu za Insajder glumica Danijela Е tajnfeld.
Danijela Е tajnfeld je iz Njujorka gde Еҫivi veДҮ godinama, doputovala u Beograd kako bi dala izjavu tuЕҫilaЕЎtvu, a u opЕЎirnoj ispovesti za Insajder glumica prvi put pred kamerama opisuje sam dogaД‘aj koji se odigrao u maju 2012. 
https://bit.ly/3lJnwRh

snippet.title: Hurricane - LOCO LOCO - Serbia рҹҮ·рҹҮё  - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-

it.title: Dipingi le uova senza sostanze chimiche nel modo originale - abbastanza naturale
it.description:
La Pasqua si avvicina, quindi ecco il primo video di quest'anno per dipingere le uova. Dipingi le uova nel modo originale senza l'uso di prodotti chimici, abbastanza naturalmente. AffinchГ© l'uovo abbia questo effetto, ГЁ meglio usare il bianco, quindi all'inizio del video puoi vedere come sbiancare un normale uovo giallo.

INGREDIENTI PER SBIANCARE L'UOVO

ro.description:
PaИҷtele se apropie, aИҷa cДғ iatДғ primul videoclip pentru acest an pentru vopsirea ouДғlor. VopsiИӣi ouДғle Г®n modul original, fДғrДғ a folosi substanИӣe chimice, destul de natural. Pentru ca oul sДғ obИӣinДғ acest efect, cel mai bine este sДғ folosiИӣi albul, aИҷa cДғ la Г®nceputul videoclipului puteИӣi vedea cum sДғ albiИӣi un ou galben obiИҷnuit.

snippet.title: Putin odgovorio Bajdenu: Amerika ДҮe morati na ovo da raДҚuna
snippet.description:
Predsednik Rusije Vladimir Putin je, reagujucМҒi na izjavu ameriДҚkog predsednika DЕҫoa Bajdena, ameriДҚkom lideru poЕҫeleo zdravlje. вҖһЕ to se tiДҚe izjave mog ameriДҚkog kolege, mi se zaista, kako je rekao, znamo liДҚno. Е ta bih mu odgovorio? Rekao bih mu: Neka ste Еҫivi i zdravi! ЕҪelim mu dobro zdravljeвҖң, rekao je Putin.

Prethodno je Bajden u intervjuu za вҖһEj-Bi-Si njuzвҖң rekao da svog ruskog kolegu smatra вҖһubicomвҖң. Bajden je tokom intervjua istakao da вҖһpoznajeвҖң Vladimira Putina i da ruski predsednik вҖһpoznajeвҖң njega. Na pitanje novinara da razjasni da li Bajden smatra Putina ubicom, ameriДҚki predsednik je odgovorio: вҖһMhm, smatramвҖң.

Za sve najvaЕҫnije vesti, komentare i analize posetite naЕЎ sajt в–ә https://rs.sputniknews.com/

U moru informacija treba izabrati pravu.

ЕҪelite prvi da saznate vest, ne sumnjate u njenu taДҚnost i ispratite najbitnije dogaД‘aje u svetu koji utiДҚu i na naЕЎe Еҫivote? Interesuju vas miЕЎljenja najeminentnijih struДҚnjaka iz ЕЎirokog spektra oblasti i komentari na sve goruДҮe teme? PronaД‘ite to na Sputnjiku.

в–ҢGOVORIMO ONO Е TO DRUGI PREДҶUTKUJUв–җ

Sajt вҖһSputnjik SrbijaвҖң в–ә https://rs.sputniknews.com/

Pratite nas na druЕЎtvenim mreЕҫama:

Fejsbuk в–ә https://www.facebook.com/rs.sputniknews 
Tviter в–ә https://twitter.com/rs_sputnik
Instagram в–ә https://www.instagram.com/sputnik_srbija/ 
Telegram в–ә https://telegram.me/SputnikSrbija

Kolor korekcija: Dragan PeriДҮ
Kamera: Petar StankoviДҮ
Rasveta: Sound & Light Rental

IzvrЕЎni producent: Nemanja PetroviДҮ
Scenario i ReЕҫija: Strahinja GoluboviДҮ

Hvala prijateljima : 
@dresovi_euro i @p2dsgn

Tekst :

Verse 1 (Jostra)

U gradu je kriminal, lova je u firmama
Bebe nose minival - braДҮa nose kilogram
Kola ot Bulgaria - Еҫivim sa gorilama
Roba prva ruka, letim Kosovo-Bolivija

Dok piЕЎamo uz vetar (uu uU)
Pijemo uz JuЕҫni vetar (uu uu)
Vodim igru kao Petar MaraЕЎ (uu uu)
Nisi brЕҫi nego metak, kalaЕЎ (uu uu) 

Ratata, 24 karata
Oko vrata i za brata oko ruke zlatan sat
Na ulici - ljubi brat, ovo ti je juЕҫni gas
Ovo nije Е vajcarska, Balkan bure baruta

Hook:

Uspeh i moДҮ
Nocas ne ДҚekaj me ja ti neДҮu doДҮ
Uspeh i moДҮ 
Sve ЕЎto doД‘e mi za dan to ode mi za noДҮ
Uspeh i moДҮ
I samo pare leДҚe ovu bol
juЕҫni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

Verse 2 (Eldorado)

Jajare misle da menjaju svet
samo na rafalno hekler je 5
prenecu kofer i dobijaЕЎ ket
sad sam na granici zovem za pet
naЕЎa gerila je spremna do zuba
cistimo teren ko da smo UDBA
metkovi kamate kurve i gudra
brza frizura i devetka duga
nece ni Bog viЕЎe da sudi
pravo kroz staklo metak u grudi
nocu se ЕЎibamo danju smo budni
sanduci borbene opreme puni
cetiri je strane sveta
veliki izbor nema ЕЎta
ja kod mene dva paketa
Nek mi sudi 92


Hook:

Uspeh i moc 
Nocas ne cekaj me ja ti necu doc
Uspeh i moc 
Sve ЕЎto dodje mi za dan to ode mi za noc
Uspeh i moc 
I samo pare lece ovu bol
juЕҫni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвҖӢвҖӢ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.

Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвҖӢвҖӢ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвҖӢвҖӢ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвҖӢвҖӢ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвҖӢвҖӢ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвҖҷs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

snippet.title: Panathinaikos OPAP Athens - Crvena Zvezda mts Belgrade Highlights | EuroLeague, RS Round 30
snippet.description:
Crvena Zvezda MTS Belgrade took a hard-fought victory from OAKA after beating Panathinaikos OPAP Athens 82-86 on Friday night. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continentвҖҷs two premier menвҖҷs basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sportвҖҷs premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: Hercai 64. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
64. BГ¶lГјm Г–zeti рҹҰӢ
Miran, ReyyanвҖҷДұn Г¶lГјmle yГјz yГјze geldiДҹini Г¶Дҹrenir. BГјtГјn olanlarДұn sorumlusu FГјsunвҖҷdur ve Miran ona bedel Г¶detecektir.  Ve ReyyanвҖҷДұn hastalДұДҹДұ, Hazar ve Azize arasДұnda yeni bir kapДұyДұ aГ§ar. Д°ntikam almak iГ§in CihanвҖҷa anlaЕҹma teklif eden FГјsun, ЕһadoДҹlu ailesini bir arada tutan her Еҹeyi, tek tek yok etmeye yemin eder. ReyyanвҖҷДұ kurtarmak iГ§in Г§abalayan Miran, vakДұfta Г§Дұkan yangДұnla sarsДұlДұr. Cihan, FГјsunвҖҷun anlaЕҹma teklifini kabul edecek mi? Azize, yДұllar sonra kavuЕҹtuДҹu oДҹlu HazarвҖҷla arasДұndaki duvarlarДұ yДұkmayДұ baЕҹarabilecek mi? BГјyГјk bir kaosun ortasДұnda kalan Reyyan, canДұ pahasДұna doДҹurmak istediДҹi UmutвҖҷtan vazgeГ§mek zorunda kalacak mДұ?

AyrДұcalДұklardan yararlanmak iГ§in bu kanala katДұlДұn:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join 

вҖңД°ntikamdan doДҹan imkansДұz bir aЕҹkДұn hikayesiвҖқ

YapДұmcДұlДұДҹДұnДұ, Mia YapДұm Banu Akdeniz ГјstlendiДҹi, "Д°ntikamdan doДҹan imkansДұz bir aЕҹkДұn hikayesi" mottosuyla yola Г§Дұkan Hercai'nin baЕҹrollerini AkДұn AkДұnГ¶zГј, Ebru Еһahin, GГјlГ§in SantДұroДҹlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Г–zer, Oya UnustasДұ, Tansu TaЕҹanlar ve  Д°lay ErkГ¶k paylaЕҹДұyor.

tr.title: Hercai 64. BГ¶lГјm
tr.description:
64. BГ¶lГјm Г–zeti рҹҰӢ
Miran, ReyyanвҖҷДұn Г¶lГјmle yГјz yГјze geldiДҹini Г¶Дҹrenir. BГјtГјn olanlarДұn sorumlusu FГјsunвҖҷdur ve Miran ona bedel Г¶detecektir.  Ve ReyyanвҖҷДұn hastalДұДҹДұ, Hazar ve Azize arasДұnda yeni bir kapДұyДұ aГ§ar. Д°ntikam almak iГ§in CihanвҖҷa anlaЕҹma teklif eden FГјsun, ЕһadoДҹlu ailesini bir arada tutan her Еҹeyi, tek tek yok etmeye yemin eder. ReyyanвҖҷДұ kurtarmak iГ§in Г§abalayan Miran, vakДұfta Г§Дұkan yangДұnla sarsДұlДұr. Cihan, FГјsunвҖҷun anlaЕҹma teklifini kabul edecek mi? Azize, yДұllar sonra kavuЕҹtuДҹu oДҹlu HazarвҖҷla arasДұndaki duvarlarДұ yДұkmayДұ baЕҹarabilecek mi? BГјyГјk bir kaosun ortasДұnda kalan Reyyan, canДұ pahasДұna doДҹurmak istediДҹi UmutвҖҷtan vazgeГ§mek zorunda kalacak mДұ?

snippet.title: Sta Bi Se Desilo Kad Bi Svi Prdnuli U isto Vreme ?
snippet.description:
Ko ne lajkuje video nije dobar covek рҹҳҒ

Svi smo nekad u zivotu prdnuli, nekad pustimo one stidljive gasove koje niko ne primeti, nekad one sto smrde, nekad one glasne, a nekad uz neke od njih ide i iznenadjenje. Ali sta bi se desilo kad bi u isto vreme, svi ljudi na planeti, bez imalo stida, prdnuli. Da li bi to uticalo na kvalitet vazduha ? Koliko bi se osecalo ? I sta bi jedna sibica mogla da uradi, hajmo da saznamo.

Podrzite nas na Patreonu: https://bit.ly/2DY7fn3
Mail za Saradnju/Business email: BojanZlatarevic@gmail.com

Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - theyвҖҷre only there until March 31st!

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

ItвҖҷs Saturday morning, so you know what time it isвҖҰ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

WeвҖҷve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing whoвҖҷs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think itвҖҷll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the LamboвҖҷs bonnet, youвҖҷll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But thatвҖҷs not allвҖҰ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? ThereвҖҷs only one way to find outвҖҰ LETвҖҷS RACE!

snippet.title: ROSГү - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
ItвҖҷs funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your goldвҖҷs just plastic

Every day every night
IвҖҷve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me IвҖҷm never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (YouвҖҷre running out of time)

My worldвҖҷs been hectic seems electric
But IвҖҷve been waking up with your voice in my head
And IвҖҷm trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute IвҖҷm without you I regret it

Every day every night
IвҖҷve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me IвҖҷm never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (YouвҖҷre running out of time)

IвҖҷm way up in the clouds
And they say IвҖҷve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвҖҷs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonвҖҷt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: MaЕЎa Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвҖҷs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee JhenГ© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, sГӨje, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); sГӨje for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

localized.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
localized.description:
MusicвҖҷs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee JhenГ© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, sГӨje, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); sГӨje for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUДҢAVANJA - DraЕҫa PetroviДҮ: Vladimir Cvijan je negde ubijen, zabranjeno je da se o tome piЕЎe!
snippet.description:
U najnovijem izdanju emisije "Bez ustruДҚavanja" gost je bio glavni i odgovorni urednik dnevnog lista Danas Dragoljub DraЕҫa PetroviДҮ. DraЕҫu PetroviДҮa nije toliko iznenadila vest o smrti Vladimira Cvijana koliko ga je iznenadila ДҮutnja medija kojima je zabranjeno da o toj vesti piЕЎu. On istiДҚe da mu je joЕЎ pre tri godine kolega iz Srpskog telegrafa rekao da je Vladimir Cvijan ubijen, ali je ovo samo dokaz da postoji centar koji odluДҚuje koje vesti mogu, a koje vesti ne smeju da se objavljuju. PetroviДҮ podseДҮa da je tako bilo i kada je sin ЕҪeljka MitroviДҮ pregazio devojku na peЕЎaДҚkom prelazu kada je do njega stigla sms poruka koju je Suzana VasiljeviДҮ, savetnica Aleksandra VuДҚiДҮa, uputila uredniku jednog lista gde ga moli da ne bude grub prema mlaД‘em MitroviДҮu. Vest da je kompanija United media kupila list Danas izazvala je brojne komentare, ali DraЕҫa PetroviДҮ tvrdi da ta transakcija neДҮe uticati na ureД‘ivaДҚku politiku lista. IstiДҚe da se nisu prodali Дҗilasu, veДҮ Е olaku, ali da ДҮe politika lista ostati nepromenjena. List Danas otvoren je za dijalog i polemiku i objavljuje tekstove predstavnika razliДҚitih politiДҚkih stavova zbog ДҚega je redakcija ДҚesto kritikovana ДҚak i od najvernijih ДҚitalaca. Poznati srpski pisac Svetislav Basara godinama je redovni kolumnista lista Danas, ali je na iznenaД‘enje svih preЕЎao u tabloid Kurir. Glavni motiv prelaska po reДҚima DraЕҫe PetroviДҮa je bio visoki honorar. Kada je reДҚ o reЕҫimskim medijima zanimljiv je mentalni sklop njihovih urednika, jer je DraЕҫa PetroviДҮ imao  interesantno iskustvo sa vlasnikom Pinka ЕҪeljkom MitroviДҮem koji je posle negativne kampanje protiv Danasa bez griЕҫe savesti pokuЕЎao da ostvari i privatni kontakt sa DraЕҫom.

snippet.title: Emanet 140. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 140
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#GГјГ§lГјOlacaДҹДұz

snippet.title: Emanet 139. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 139
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#yetiЕҹemeseydim

snippet.title: KuДҮa od srca S07, porodica VeliДҚkoviДҮ 01  PINK 21. 03. 12h premijerna epizoda porodice VeliДҚkoviДҮ 02
snippet.description: Projekat "KuДҮa od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugroЕҫenijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajedniДҚke ciljeve i prikljuДҚilo se projektu вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ u pomoДҮi pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugroЕҫenih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ uz podrЕЎku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vraДҮene u obrazovni sistem ЕЎto rezultira resocijalizacijom svih ДҚlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlaД‘e ДҚlanove druЕЎtva. Osnovna ideja projekta вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ jeste ukljuДҚivanje celokupne zajednice u pomoДҮ porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva proglaЕЎene najugroЕҫenijim. Ono ЕЎto izdvaja serijal вҖңKuДҮa od srcaвҖқ, jeste ДҚinjenica da je to prvi domaДҮi rijaliti, koji se pored reЕЎavanja stambenog pitanja kroz graД‘evinske radove, bavi i reЕЎavanjem porodiДҚnih i meД‘uljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuДҮe po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavrЕЎava, objekat ostaje u zateДҚenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuДҚi I pomogne u zavrЕЎetku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbliЕҫih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju KuДҮe od srca . 3. NajbliЕҫi ДҚlanovi porodice, prijatelji I komЕЎije moraju imati pozitivno miЕЎljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni ДҚlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti druЕЎtveno odgovorni : da nisu uЕҫivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izraЕҫenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ДҚlan porodice koji je uДҚesnik serijala prekrЕЎi bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUДҢAVANJA - Milan DumanoviДҮ: VuДҚiДҮ je eleminisao Belivuka jer se osilio i nije ga viЕЎe sluЕЎao
snippet.description:
Gost emisije вҖңBez ustruДҚavanjaвҖқ bio je nekadaЕЎnji pripadnik Uprave kriminalistiДҚke policije Milan DumanoviДҮ o kojoj nije ЕЎtedeo reДҚi i otvoreno govorio o umeЕЎanosti pripadnika policije i drugih drЕҫavnih institucija u kriminalne radnje, koje se kako kaЕҫe tek otkrivaju. Naime, DumanoviДҮ smatra da su afere tek poДҚele da se otkrivaju i da ДҮe se u narednom periodu tek otkrivati, ЕЎto bi po njegovim reДҚima moglo ozbiljno da uzdrma vlast. Po njegovim reДҚima sukob izmeД‘u NebojЕЎe StefanoviДҮa i Aleksandra VuДҚiДҮa, otkrio je dosadaЕЎnje afere, ali ДҮe nas tek oДҚekivati otkrivanje novih. Milan DumanoviДҮ je sa profesionalne strane komentarisao hapЕЎenje kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka, ali i otvoreno govorio o nekadaЕЎnjoj drЕҫavnoj sekretarki Dijani HrkaloviДҮ. Ko su kljuДҚni ljudi iz vrha vlasti, policije, BIA-e, fudbalskog kluba Partizan, koji su bili umeЕЎani sa kriminalnim grupama, saznaДҮete u emisiji. DumanoviДҮ je podsetio da su on i kolega Mladen TrboviДҮ dobili otkaze 2016. godine kada su ukazali na nepravilnosti u radu policije i joЕЎ tada izneli tvrdnje da je Dijana HrkaloviДҮ kako kaЕҫe вҖңprivatizovalaвҖқ policiju. O ovom sluДҚaju o kojem se joЕЎ uvek vodi sudski epilog, ali i o pokretu вҖңOslobodjenjeвҖқ, samo su neke od mnogih tema o kojima je govorio Milan DumanoviДҮ.

snippet.title: Emanet 138. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 138
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
